title: HATE P0a/P0b implementation readiness gate

assumptions.text: Initial implementation scope is HATE-MVP-001 through HATE-MVP-003.
assumptions.impact_on_coverage: P0b/QEG bundle is excluded from the first implementation gate.

assumptions.text: Shipyard-cp runtime API integration is deferred to P1b.
assumptions.impact_on_coverage: Local advisory evidence is sufficient for P0a implementation start.

reasons: P0a specification, schemas, golden fixture, executable CLI, and Shipyard advisory evidence exist.
P0a DQ negative fixtures reproduce expected hard_dq behavior.
P0a implementation completion is Go for the local-first slice.
P0b/QEG bundle and Shipyard runtime integration must not be claimed complete yet.

blocking_risks.scenario: P0a implementation completion is mistaken for P0b or full implementation completion.
QEG bundle gaps are hidden by a passing P0a precheck.

waivers.containment: Use local advisory shipyard-run-evidence until P1b.

required_follow_up: Run a separate P0b gate before claiming QEG bundle completion.
Implement P1a AETE, doctor, replay, compare, explain, and recommend outputs.
Keep Shipyard runtime API mapping separated until P1b.
